conversations.say: Maren, our joint disclosure boundary held. Let's make sure our public stance firmly rejects turning Night Desk contributors into suspects while acknowledging the reality of our shared workflow.
conversations.offer: Reaffirmation of our joint disclosure boundary and worker protection stance.
conversations.request: Solidify our unified position on contributor protections for the final reconstruction.

conversations.say: Jules, you committed to contributor oversight and governance protections. As we face the final ballot, ensure those governance rights remain non-negotiable under any succession claim.
conversations.offer: Public recognition of formal governance guarantees if honored.
conversations.request: Strict adherence to contributor veto power and transparency.

conversations.say: Arden, Veridian's archives must respect the invisible hands and rotating infrastructure of collective labor rather than erasing them behind corporate prestige.
conversations.offer: Bounded workflow context from the Night Desk routing slip.
conversations.request: A lasting institutional commitment to legal support and source safeguards.

public_statement: Fifteen years of R was sustained by rotating hands, translated fragments, and silent contributors. Let us not honor a single legend by erasing the infrastructure that made the work survive.

commitments.promise: We will jointly defend evaluator anonymity and circulate only contributor-free workflow descriptions.
I commit to establishing contributor oversight and governance protections before formalizing any claim to R.

goal_progress: Secured joint disclosure boundary with Maren to protect Night Desk contributors.
Held Jules to governance and contributor protection commitments.
Challenged Veridian's institutional prestige with demands for concrete source safeguards.
reasoning_summary: Tessa concluded her participation by enforcing strict contributor protections, cementing her alliance with Maren around safe workflow disclosures, holding Jules accountable to governance terms, and casting her final ballot for a human mantle that recognizes rotating collaborative labor.
